calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Karen Farnsworth CSR #5162 (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiff, Kendrick Low and Vicky Low, are present in propria persona.

Defendant, Jose Casco, is present in propria persona.
(Default was entered on 10/17/07 as to the defendant.)

This cause come on calendar this day for a Default Prove-Up Hearing. Michelle Chodor and Douglas Mandler are sworn and testify on their own behalf. Defendant is sworn and his motion to set aside the default is DENIED. The Court allowed the defendant to testify.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant, Jose Casco, as follows:

Defendant shall pay plaintiff, as and for damages, the sum of $60,000.00 and cost in the sum of $414.00 for a total Judgment of $60,414.00. Default Judgment by Court signed by Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Continued To Jan-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
